title: Meadow's Crosshair Plus
description: Changes crosshair, sweeping animation and weather, perfect for pvp and bridging
body:
This pack primarily **improves the crosshair** for a **cleaner PvP experience**. The added diagonal pixels also make it **well-suited for bridging**. Additionally, the sweeping attack animation has been redesigned from 32×32 to 16×16 pixels, making it **less obtrusive** and better **aligned with Minecraft’s default textures**. To further **improve visibility**, weather effects have also been adjusted: rain and snow textures have been simplified to **increase overall view distance**.

License --- This pack is licenced under CC-BY-NC. You are free to use and share it as long as you credit me and do not use it commercially.
